events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes "mechanical digging inside tolerance zone" for locates & marking work on a commercial project. According to 811/CGA best practices, mechanical digging inside the tolerance zone (typically 24 inches from the outer edge of the marked utility) is prohibited without proper precautions. Only hand digging or vacuum excavation should be used within the tolerance zone. Mechanical digging inside the tolerance zone is non-compliant and poses a high risk of utility damage.

This is a fail.
